items.shape_or_design: thin elongated chain with simple links
items.rationale: Visible as a thin chain with simple links, typical weight conservatively 4-6g, likely 22K purity based on traditional yellow metal appearance, gold rate for 22K used at 12435 INR/g with nominal making charges included.

items.shape_or_design: rounded linked bead-like elements forming a necklace
items.rationale: Heavier ornate necklace with rounded beads; conservatively estimated weight 15-20g, 22K purity consistent with traditional design, gold rate at 12435 INR/g, including moderate making charges.

items.shape_or_design: broad flat band with fine detailed segments, curved circular shape
items.rationale: Broad flat necklace usually substantial weight; conservatively 40-50g estimated, traditional appearance suggests likely 22K, gold rate 12435 INR/g with making charges included.

items.type: delicate chain or necklace with small pendant
items.shape_or_design: thin chain with small beads or pendants attached
items.estimated_material: gold-colored metallic with possible pearls or stones
items.rationale: Thin and delicate chain with small pendant, possibly containing non-gold elements reducing gold weight; estimated weight 3-5g and likely 18K due to possible stones or pearls, gold rate 10174 INR/g applied.

items.shape_or_design: cylindrical stacked bangles with raised patterns
items.rationale: Set of 3 bangles, typical total weight for 3 bangles conservatively 30-40g, traditional shine and design suggests likely 22K purity, gold rate 12435 INR/g with making charges.

items.type: pair of studs or small earrings
items.shape_or_design: two small round floral shapes with petals, identical
items.rationale: Small pair of earrings, combined weight conservatively estimated 2-3g, traditional gold appearance likely 22K, gold rate 12435 INR/g used.

assumptions: Gold rate used strictly as 22K = 12435 INR/g and 18K = 10174 INR/g per Goodreturns data dated 23 March 2026.
Making charges included conservatively in value estimates.
Purity assigned based on traditional design cues: mostly likely 22K, except delicate chain with possible stones at 18K.
Weights estimated conservatively within typical ranges for these jewellery types and design styles.
Total value ranges summed exactly from individual item ranges.
Items counted as per visible distinct pieces; bangles counted as 3 in the stack.
Overlap and occlusion issues accounted by conservative underestimation.
